summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Video Tutorials and Interactive Tours feature. All 8 features tested and verified working correctly. Tutorials page loads with 3 tabs (Guided Walkthroughs, Video Slideshows, Interactive Tours). All interactive elements functioning properly.

issues: Minor accessibility warnings in console: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen readers'. Not blocking but recommended to add VisuallyHidden title component.

passed_tests: 3 tabs present: Guided Walkthroughs, Video Slideshows, Interactive Tours (data-testid attributes working)
Guided Walkthroughs tab: 7 tutorial cards displayed with expand/collapse functionality
Tutorial cards expand to show 'Step-by-Step Walkthrough' with numbered steps
Expanded cards have 3 action buttons: 'Open in App', 'Watch Slideshow', 'Start Tour'
Video Slideshows tab: 7 video cards with preview thumbnails and slide count badges
Slideshow dialog opens correctly with screenshot images
Slideshow controls: Play/Pause button works (toggles icon)
Slideshow controls: Next/Previous slide buttons navigate slides
Slideshow controls: Slide dots (3 dots for 3-slide tutorial) allow direct navigation
Slideshow shows caption overlay at bottom of each slide
Interactive Tours tab: 5 tour cards displayed with 'Start Tour' buttons
React-joyride integration works - tooltip appears pointing to sidebar nav element
Tour tooltip shows correct content ('Click here to open the Project Estimator...')
Tour can be closed via Skip/Finish buttons or Escape key
Search functionality filters tutorials by title/description (tested with 'Excel')
Category filter badges work correctly (tested 'Core Features' filter)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
action_items: Minor: Add VisuallyHidden title to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
React-joyride v3.0.0-7 integration works correctly with React 19
Tutorial screenshots are properly stored in /tutorial_slides/ and loading correctly
TOUR_STEPS and TUTORIAL_IMAGES mappings are well-organized and comprehensive
seed_data_creation: None required - uses static tutorial data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tutorials feature fully functional. Key elements: (1) 3 tabs with data-testid 'tab-walkthroughs', 'tab-videos', 'tab-tours', (2) tutorial cards with data-testid 'tutorial-card-{id}', 'video-card-{id}', 'tour-card-{id}', (3) slideshow controls with 'play-pause-btn', 'next-slide-btn', 'prev-slide-btn', 'slide-dot-{idx}', (4) react-joyride tooltips target sidebar nav elements with data-testid 'nav-{item}'.
console_warnings: Chart dimension warnings on Dashboard (unrelated to Tutorials feature)
DialogContent accessibility warning (minor, add VisuallyHidden title for compliance)
